methodsAttempted.notes: Fetched robots.txt from the official Jouf University domain. The selected article paths were not disallowed; paginated listing paths and some administrative listing paths are disallowed and were not crawled.

methodsAttempted.query: site:ju.edu.sa "الذكاء الاصطناعي" "جامعة الجوف" سياسة OR استخدام OR دليل
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found official Jouf University Arabic pages about adopting and launching an Artificial Intelligence course, plus event, program, and partnership pages.
Additional official-domain search surfaced mostly events, workshops, news, and program pages. No central university-wide generative AI use policy was found in the checked official results.

methodsAttempted.query: site:ju.edu.sa "ChatGPT" OR "generative AI" OR "AI policy" "Jouf University"
methodsAttempted.notes: English/generative-AI terms produced no official policy page; the only result was a hackathon participation page, not policy guidance.

artifacts.summary: Discovery found official Jouf University pages with substantive AI curriculum information, but not a central university-wide AI use policy. Claims are scoped to the adopted/launched AI course and its described teaching content.

artifacts.title: Jouf University AI curriculum source update
artifacts.summary: Official Jouf University pages indicate that the university approved and launched an Artificial Intelligence course. The evidence supports curriculum and teaching-content claims only; no central university-wide AI use policy was found in the checked official sources.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The checked official sources support AI curriculum/course claims, not a general rule for student or staff use of AI tools.
